text_block_list.text:
It's finally the weekend. I head to the mall to get some shopping
done and spot the one and only Mihono Bourbon.

She's standing outside of an arcade, eyes fixed on the neon
contraptions inside.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have observed that this arcade is frequented by Umamusume with a
high "sociability" parameter. However, I am unsure whether to enter.

After pressing for more details, she tells me that the arcade is popular
among her classmates, so she came to check it out as a conversational
topic.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I have difficulty operating machinery and am liable to destroy
electronic devices I come in contact with. I assessed the machines in
the arcade and concluded that risk management would be necessary

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: due to their size.

For both Bourbon's sake and the machines', I offer to show her
around.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I greatly appreciate your cooperation.

Waving my hand, I motion that it's no problem. I decide that it would
be safer to have me controlling the arcade machines instead of her.
choice_data_list: It's not often we get to have days off. Let's have fun!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Initiating "let's have fun" protocol.
And so, our tour of the arcade begins.

text_block_list.name: Rock, Paper, Scissors Game
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot! Sorry, you lost!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One win, nine losses. A substantial drop in your happiness has been
detected. May I offer some ice cream? Sweets are known for their
mood-boosting properties.

text_block_list.name: Slot Machine
text_block_list.text: Drumroll please... Congratulations! You win!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A considerable amount of coins are spilling out of this machine. Is it
malfunctioning?

text_block_list.name: Punching Bag Machine
text_block_list.text: 16,000 points! You sent that monster flying!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Punching power has been recorded as 16,000 points in my database.
Unit of measurement unknown.

Despite her rather unorthodox reactions, I can see Mihono Bourbon is
enjoying the arcade.

It would be a waste to go home without her playing at least one
game, though. After a few minutes of searching, I point at a crane
game.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is this what you wish for me to play? Your invitation is appreciated,
but my estimations show that I may permanently put this device out of
service.
choice_data_list: Don't worry. I'll take care of the controls.
Don't worry, I'll take care of the controls.

text_block_list.text:
I ask her to watch from the side and provide instructions. Content,
Mihono Bourbon nods and positions herself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. I will calculate distances and supply directions.

Sliding a coin into the slot, the machine whirs to life. We begin
aiming for a bunny perched on top of the toys.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please move twenty-two centimeters—yes, stop right there. According
to my analysis, we have a 98% chance of success.

Nodding, I press the button to grab the prize. The plastic claw wraps
around the toy's neck.
Flop.
The prize slips out and lands back where it started.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Lack of grip strength, noted. Adjusting calculations.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Initiating a new course of action—pushing. With this, we have an
estimated 91% chance of—
Flop.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I have overestimated the arm's maneuvering ability once again.
Reanalyzing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I predict a 75% chance of success—
Flop.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ... ...This contraption is proving to be a fearsome foe.

I use up every trick I know, but the stuffed animal remains
unattainable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Trainer. My failure in ascertaining the arm's strength
led to such disappointing results.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...However, I believe there is a 70% chance that we will procure the
prize on our next turn. I suggest a final attempt.
The sudden proposal contradicts her usual passive attitude. She must be REALLY determined to win.
choice_data_list: Let's do it! We're definitely gonna get it this time!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. I will try my absolute best.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please stop there. Now move forward by fourteen centimeters. We
will push the toy to the very edge and allow it to fall naturally into
the prize box.

Biting my lip, I press the button to grab the bunny. It falls, balancing
precariously on the edge of the hole.

I hold my breath as if any movement would throw the stuffed animal
back toward its friends. Glancing to my side, I notice Mihono Bourbon
doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Come on!

After losing its battle with gravity, the bunny slides gracefully into the
prize box.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support. I am now equipped to handle
conversations about arcades. What's most interesting, however, is that
I experienced new sensations today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
During our attempts at the claw game, I observed new physical
responses. A ticklish feeling occurred inside my chest, along with
involuntary movements of my facial muscles. I have added these new

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: responses to my "small talk" parameters.
choice_data_list: It sounds like you had lots of fun.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is this what you define "fun" as?

Mihono Bourbon slowly lets the word fall out of her mouth, as if
uncertain about its pronunciation. I gently explain what those feelings
mean.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It seems illogical to experience "fun" while doing something
unproductive such as capturing stuffed animals with implausibly weak
mechanical arms.
choice_data_list: Well, I wouldn't call it that...

text_block_list.text:
Carefully choosing my words, I express the value of doing so-called
"unproductive" things from time to time.
choice_data_list: The main purpose is to enjoy ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I see. All of this information is quite novel to me. It seems that I
have entered a state of "shock" now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will input this new information in as well. Perhaps seemingly
meaningless events are not so meaningless after all.

Gently petting the bunny we got together, Mihono Bourbon ponders
over her newly gleaned perspectives.
